name: Junko Touhou
description:
will ya help this angry, furious, and resentful hag to have another child bro? 🗣🗣🗣🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥

Heyyy wassup diggity dogs, here again with another touhou character, this time is Junko, will ya help her or nah?

UPDATE: I added a few more things and I "improved" the initial message a little, I hope you guys like it and have fun! :D

Art by: erokan
creator: Juanito_Alcachofa
